mapper.insert: INSERT INTO install_record (user_id, skill_id, installed_version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillId}, #{installedVersion}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE installed_version = VALUES(installed_version), installed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT ir.skill_id AS skillId, s.name AS skillName, DATE_FORMAT(ir.installed_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS installedAt, ir.installed_version AS installedVersion, sv.version AS latestVersion, CASE WHEN sv.version IS NOT NULL AND ir.installed_version IS NOT NULL AND sv.version <> ir.installed_version THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS updateAvailable, CASE WHEN s.status = 'offline' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS offline FROM install_record ir INNER JOIN skill s ON s.id = ir.skill_id LEFT JOIN skill_version sv ON sv.id = ( SELECT id FROM skill_version WHERE skill_id = ir.skill_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ir.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ir.installed_at DESC, ir.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
